entry.title: you're more than stained glass, you're the light that comes through
entry.summary:
Author: itz_blakey

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,922Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Merlin drinks an enchanted drink meant for Arthur. He expects a lot of things to happen but being able to read minds is not among them.

entry.title: The Shape of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,981Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 50

Summary: Arthur has always trusted Merlin—just not for the reasons Merlin thinks. When Camelot’s peace fractures and something ancient begins to stir, secrets long held in silence begin to surface…and not all of them belong to Merlin.

entry.title: to protect a kingdom (is to protect you)
entry.summary:
Author: Katiebabyangel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,035Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 438

Summary: Merlin isn't the first servant Arthur found a friend in. The daughter of one of his childhood nannies, Eira, has served as his maidservant her entire life. When Merlin is appointed as Arthur's permanent manservant, and the assignment goes well, Eira is reassigned - only no one asked for her to be reassigned. Eira's life spirals out of control, the new knights start to take advantage of their station, Merlin decides he needs to protect her, and Arthur is determined to figure out what's happened to leave a bad taste in his mouth without knowing Eira's been reassigned. Featuring good!Uther (as good as Uther can get), protective!Morgana, and Arthur's morally ambiguous attempts to keep both his servants alive and safe with guest appearances by various Knights of the Round Table! -Check notes for trigger warnings!

entry.title: Curia Regis
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,751Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 135

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: Blood Doesn’t Matter (But You'd Never Know It)
entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,817Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 56

Summary: Over the years of having Merlin as his manservant, Arthur learns a lot of secrets about him—except maybe one thing, but in his defense, how was he supposed to know Merlin was running around learning how to fight with his knights? Or, a sequel to Blood Doesn’t Matter ('Til You Get Cut Open)

entry.title: all that was good
entry.summary:
Author: carrionwoes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,364Chapters: 3/30Kudos: 93

Summary: “She looks great, doesn’t she?” Gwen said, seemingly coming out of smoke and shadow. Merlin agreed wordlessly with a nod. “Some people are just born to be queen,” Gwen continued. “No?” Merlin tried to not sound too grossed out, poor Morgana. Contrary to Merlin, Gwen was actually doing her job, filling up goblets, and handing them out to various nobles. “I hope so. One day.” Though it does not seem to stir her away from partaking in healthy gossip. “Well, I would hate to be her,” Merlin exclaimed. “Who'd want to marry Arthur?” Gwen snorted at that.Or, Merlin is born a girl. Some things change, while others stay the same.

entry.title: Golden Hair/Golden Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,927Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 151

Summary: A rewriting of the series where Arthur discovers Merlin's magic way earlier. It will follow the series where it can and diverge as needed, with some fun little scenes inspired by Tumblr posts.This begins in the aftermath of the battle for Ealdor. Also don’t forget to check out part 2 of the series. It has additional backstory and plot.

entry.title: The Student or the Master?
entry.summary:
Author: Madame_Beret

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,674Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 197

Summary: From a prompt on Tumblr"As Arthur and the rest of Camelot get more comfortable with magic, Arthur makes a decision. He’s tried teaching Merlin every type of weapon out there, and he’s hopeless with every one of them. But, Merlin still insists on coming with him on dangerous quests. So, Arthur decides to have Merlin try his hand at magic so he has some sort of self defense"

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,147Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

entry.title: For you
entry.summary:
Author: KuroNikushimi

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,180Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Arthur gets kidnapped and is supposed to be sacrificed by midday. Merlin frantically searches for him, but can't find him. He comes upon a group of people who know where Arthur is.. They'll tell him, they say, if Merlin sleeps with each of them. And Merlin would do anything for Arthur. Anything. Had graphic rape but afterwards deal with Merlin's ptsd, Arthur's guilt and very slow recovery

entry.title: When Worlds Collide… and Bleed
entry.summary:
Author: dockkl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,558Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 2

Summary: After King Arthur’s coronation, Morgana arrives with an unexpected proposal—to prove that magic is not evil, but merely a tool. Together with Merlin, she discovers a way to connect different worlds and opens a gateway that brings visitors from other realities into Camelot. Heroes from across worlds meet—young wizards, the rulers of Narnia, and demigods—and together they must face a threat that has crossed over with them. Darkness takes the form of the most dangerous beings, all driven by a hunger for power and domination. An alliance between worlds becomes the only hope for survival. The fate of Camelot is not the only thing at stake, but the balance between good and evil across all realities. This story weaves together familiar heroes in an epic clash of magic, courage, and sacrifice, where every decision may mean salvation—or the destruction of every world.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Essetir’s Kings Manservant
entry.summary:
Author: RamonaflowersFrFr

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,386Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Before Hunith had decided to send Merlin to Camelot he went to try and convince King Cenred to help protect his village, one thing after another Cenred decided he liked the boy and he would be appointed his manservant — Camelot and Essetir are having feast in Camelots attempt at a peace treaty, Arthur finds himself allured by the Manservant and keeps going back to him throughout the feast, Merlin is equally as intrigued in Arthur, he can feel his magic pulling him towards Arthur every moment they’re together.

entry.title: Professor Emrys
entry.summary:
Author: Sophthenerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,535Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 329

Summary: What if Merlin was best friends with the Marauders but left for an internship just after school ended. What happens when he returns years later and learns what happened to his friends while he was gone.This is my first fic so it might be a little choppy. For some context all 5 seasons of Merlin are canon in this and this takes place while Merlin is waiting for Arthur to rise from the lake of Avalon. Books one and two of Harry Potter are the same and the story starts off just before book three.

entry.summary:

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,848Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin struggles to find complete satisfaction in his life as a housewife. Arthur helps him take a small step in the right direction

entry.title: Reign of Bloody Time
entry.summary:
Author: BadAshWolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 506Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: For one hundred years, He carved lines into the earth, and runes into himself. Now, it was time to crack both open and bring his future back to the once king. But, as warned in the days of old, nothing will be brought back from the dead without a cost. One paid in bloody secrets. He is a king-maker who has outlived his king, a warlock in truth, bartering his soul for a chance, and as he traces the gaunt hollows of his own face, the reflection ripples with the heat of his magic, a silent, shimmering promise. He will endure the hunger of the void if it means his heart never goes where he cannot follow him again.   Behold my coping mechanism in these here trying times, I submit my taxes for the fandom that brought me here. It's either this or work on my DND game.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Time Travel
  • Supernatural Elements

entry.title: only fools want to be great
entry.summary:
Author: shatteredwriters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,534Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 28

Summary: “For you, sire.” The woman said in a voice high and melodic. “As a token of our appreciation.”In her palm lay a smooth, black stone, perfectly round, golden tendrils like lightning bolts racing across the surface.Arthur raised his eyebrows.“It’s…lovely.”The old woman held the stone out to the prince. As he reached for it, she seized his wrist with her other hand, forcefully pushing the stone into his palm. Startled, Arthur tried to yank his hand away but she held firm.“It is for luck, sire.” Her gaze transfixed the prince, and he could neither move nor speak. “May it bring you the fortune you deserve.” A mysterious gift leads Arthur into a fight for his life.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
